title: Full Day Cruise and Kayak
subtitle: Lan Ha Bay & Southern Ha Long Bay
description: A full day cruising through Lan Ha Bay and the real Southern Ha Long Bay. Kayak through hidden lagoons, tunnels, and archways including K.A Cave and Bats Cave. Visit Cai Beo Floating Village, swim and beach hop at Ba Trai Dao Beach, and enjoy a magical sunset on the water. Less travelled areas only, small group, maximum 30 people.
highlights: More cruising — Lan Ha Bay & REAL Southern Ha Long Bay
Less travelled areas only
Small group — maximum 30 people on the boat
Experienced kayak guide who speaks good English
Kayaking at K.A Cave and Bats Cave
Swim and beach hop at Ba Trai Dao Beach
Visit Cai Beo Floating Village
Traditional Vietnamese lunch on board

itinerary.activity: Hotel pick up & transfer to Ben Beo Harbour
Depart & visit Floating Fishing Village. Cruise through and admire iconic islets like Turtle, Toad, and Candle Islets
Swim & snorkel at Ba Trai Dao Beaches. Enjoy crystal-clear water, slide or jump from the boat
Kayaking & Lagoons Exploration. Kayaking at Bright Cave or Tai Keo Cave, and discovering hidden lagoons
Vietnamese Traditional Lunch on board (Vegi/Vegan options available)
Back to Lan Ha Bay — Visit Floating Fish Farm. Experience daily life at a floating fish farm and see seafood raised in the bay
Refresh with a Swim or Explore Monkey Island. Spend time on a pristine beach, encounter monkeys, and hike to the island viewpoint
Sunset Party in Lan Ha Bay. Enjoy tea, fresh fruits, crackers, and drinks while admiring the breathtaking sunset
End of itinerary. Tour guide escorts guests back to their hotel

packages.name: Pick up - Drop off Cat Ba town
Pick up - Drop off Ha Noi
Pick up Ha Noi - Drop off Cat Ba town
Pick up Cat Ba - Drop off Hanoi
Pick up Hanoi - Drop off Ninh Binh
Pick up Cat Ba - Drop off Ninh Binh

title: Night Kayaking with Glowing Plankton Bioluminescent
subtitle: The original and most established operator
description: If you're a fan of starry skies, you'll definitely love the starry-like illumination that will appear on the sea as millions of bioluminescent plankton light up the waters — a truly magical experience that you wouldn't want to miss in your lifetime!
highlights: See millions of bioluminescent glowing plankton
Kayak at night under the stars and moonlight
Panoramic sunset viewpoint at Radio Tower
Traditional Vietnamese dinner on floating house
Swim to see your sparkling body in the water
Cruise under the stars in Lan Ha Bay
The original and most established operator

itinerary.activity: Pick you up, heading to Radio Tower for a panoramic sunset viewpoint
Dinner — traditional Vietnamese dishes on floating house in Cai Beo fishing village
Cruise under the stars and moonlight to Lan Ha Bay
Kayak at night, swim to see all your sparking body and experience glowing plankton
Back to the floating house, get on the boat to get back to Beo Harbour
Arrive by the harbor, get back to the hotel

title: A Full Day Trekking to National Park, Viet Hai Village & Lan Ha Bay
subtitle: Depart 8:00 AM — Arrive 17:00 PM
description: Cat Ba National Park is an extremely unique national park in the system of national parks of Vietnam. These ecosystems are adjacent and follow each other, creating extremely rich landscapes and habitats. The park is also the only conservation area of Vietnam and the world where populations of Cat Ba langur exist. Trek through tropical forests, visit Viet Hai Village, kayak on Lan Ha Bay, and visit Cai Beo Floating Village.
highlights: Trek through Cat Ba National Park tropical forest
Climb 3 mountains: Ang Vat, May Bau, Ang Phay
See yellow-headed langurs — one of the rarest animals in the Red Book
Visit Frog Pond — largest freshwater lake in the forest
Explore Viet Hai Village — small ancient village of 100 families
Lunch in Viet Hai Village with local food
Bicycle ride through Viet Hai Village
Kayak on Lan Ha Bay
Visit Cai Beo Floating Village
includes: Pick up and drop up car
Bicycles in Viet Hai Village (or electric van)
Boat through Lan Ha Bay to Cai Beo Harbor
A big bottle of mineral water each guest

itinerary.activity: Bus and tour guide pick you up at your hotel in Cat Ba town

Arrive National Park gate, take entrance fee and start trekking. On the trail through tropical forest — see mink, squirrel, monkey, birds and butterflies. Climb 3 mountains: Ang Vat, May Bau, Ang Phay
After 2.5 hours trekking (about 6 km), stop at the Frog Pond — the largest freshwater lake in the middle of the national forest. Rest 30 minutes
Continue trekking from Frog Pond up the last mountain named Doc Dai to Viet Hai Village (4 km) — a small ancient village of about 100 families
Have lunch and take a rest at Viet Hai Village. Experience fish massage your feet in cool stream flowing from Cat Ba primeval forest
Free to explore Viet Hai Village by bicycle. Take bicycling 5km to Viet Hai harbor. Get on travel boat through Lan Ha Bay, stop at a floating home for kayaking
Boat takes you back to Cai Beo wharf, visit Cai Beo Fishing Floating Village on the way back
Arrive Cai Beo wharf, car takes you back to Cat Ba town center. Finish journey

thingsToBring: Towel, swim suite (on Lan Ha Bay)

title: Half Day Trekking Cat Ba
subtitle: National Park — Ngu Lam Peak — Trung Trang Cave — Hospital Cave
description: Half day trekking to visit Cat Ba National Park, Ngu Lam Peak, Trung Trang Cave, and Hospital Cave. Climb up hundreds of stone steps and forest trails to Ngu Lam Peak — where you can see the majestic beauty of the Virgin Forests on the island. Visit Trung Trang Cave with many stalactites and stalagmites, and Hospital Cave built during the war with 3 floors and 17 separate rooms.
highlights: Climb to Ngu Lam Peak — panoramic views of Virgin Forests
Visit Trung Trang Cave — natural limestone cave with stalactites
Explore Hospital Cave — military hospital built 1965
Hear the symphony of mountain birds and insects
See wildlife: mink, squirrels, monkeys, birds
includes: Local experienced English speaking tour guide (driver)

itinerary.activity: Pick up by bus at your hotel in Cat Ba town center, driving along main road through the romantic island (about 20 minutes away)
Arrived at Cat Ba National Park gate, get off the bus then walk around 1.5km into the forest. Climb up hundreds stone steps and forest trails to Ngu Lam Peak (up and down in 2 hours)
Head to Trung Trang Cave — a natural limestone cave with many stalactites and stalagmites. Walk through 300m long from one side through the mountain to the other side
Visit Hospital Cave (Quan Y Cave) — a military hospital built in 1965 during the war, with 3 floors and 17 separate rooms
Head back to Cat Ba town, ending the trip

title: Eco Day Cruise & Kayaking in Lan Ha Bay
subtitle: Limited to 25 Guests
description: Join our ECO day cruise in Lan Ha Bay with kayaking, swimming, floating village visit, lunch on board, sunset party and hotel pick-up. Cruise through Lan Ha Bay admiring iconic islets, swim and snorkel at Ba Trai Dao Beaches, kayak at Bright Cave or Tai Keo Cave, visit a floating fish farm, explore Monkey Island, and enjoy a sunset party with fresh fruits and drinks.
highlights: Kayaking through limestone karsts at Bright Cave or Tai Keo Cave
Swimming & snorkeling in emerald waters at Ba Trai Dao
Visit floating fishing village & fish farm
Explore Monkey Island with short hike to viewpoint
Fresh Vietnamese lunch on board (Vegi/Vegan available)
Sunset party with tea, fruits, crackers and drinks
Hotel pick-up & drop-off included
Small group — limited to 25 guests

itinerary.activity: Hotel pick up & transfer to Ben Beo Harbour
Depart & visit Floating Fishing Village. Cruise through and admire iconic islets like Turtle, Toad, and Candle Islets
Swim & snorkel at Ba Trai Dao Beaches. Enjoy crystal-clear water, slide or jump from the boat
Kayaking & Lagoons Exploration. Kayaking at Bright Cave or Tai Keo Cave, discovering hidden lagoons
Vietnamese Traditional Lunch on board (Vegi/Vegan options available)
Back to Lan Ha Bay — Visit Floating Fish Farm
Refresh with a Swim or Explore Monkey Island. Beach time, encounter monkeys, short hike to viewpoint
Sunset Party in Lan Ha Bay. Tea, fresh fruits, crackers, drinks while admiring the sunset
End of itinerary. Tour guide escorts guests back to their hotel
